_source: CS Capital internal research + public sources (Wikipedia, CEC reports, AEMO). Updated March 2026.
_context: CS Capital specialises in Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) advisory and asset management. A$1bn+ track record.

marketOverview.totalGridScaleInstalled2024: ~5 GW / 11 GWh under construction or operational end-2023 (CEC 2024 Report)
marketOverview.investment2023: A$4.9B new BESS investment commitments in 2023 (up from A$1.9B in 2022)
marketOverview.investment2024: Continued acceleration in 2024 with CIS scheme awarding storage contracts
marketOverview.cisBESSTarget: 9 GW of new dispatchable/storage capacity contracted under CIS by 2030
marketOverview.driverSummary: Rapid coal retirement, high renewable penetration (39%+), and grid stability needs are driving massive BESS demand across NEM states
marketOverview.costTrend: BESS capex costs declined ~60% 2018-2024. Current benchmark A$700-900k/MWh installed (all-in, 2-hour BESS)
marketOverview.dominantTech: Lithium Iron Phosphate (LFP) - now dominant chemistry for grid-scale due to safety and cost

keyProjects.name: Hornsdale Power Reserve (HPR)
keyProjects.notes: World's first large-scale grid battery. Proved BESS commercial model for Australia. Part of Brookfield's A$6.1B Neoen acquisition.

keyProjects.name: Victorian Big Battery (VBB)
keyProjects.notes: Largest BESS in Southern Hemisphere at commissioning. Built by Neoen. Now owned by HMC Capital.

keyProjects.name: Waratah Super Battery
keyProjects.notes: One of the largest BESS projects globally. Akaysha Energy acquired by BlackRock. CIS contract.

keyProjects.name: Torrens Island BESS
keyProjects.notes: AGL's flagship BESS project replacing retiring gas plant.

keyProjects.name: Gannawarra Solar Farm + BESS
keyProjects.notes: Early co-located solar + BESS project in Victoria.

keyProjects.name: Eraring BESS
keyProjects.notes: Co-located with Eraring coal plant site (closing 2025). Major Origin BESS investment.

stateBreakdown.southAustralia: Pioneer state. Hornsdale HPR, multiple other BESS. >70% renewables, BESS essential for grid stability. SA govt has been proactive with storage procurement.
stateBreakdown.victoria: Victorian Big Battery (300MW/450MWh) operational. Waratah adjacent (NSW). VRET driving strong pipeline. HMC Capital, Neoen/Brookfield active.
stateBreakdown.nsw: Largest pipeline. NSW Electricity Infrastructure Roadmap requires significant BESS. Waratah Super Battery (700MW). Eraring BESS proposed. TransGrid BESS projects.
stateBreakdown.queensland: Strong pipeline under QLD Energy and Jobs Plan. 70% RE by 2032 requires ~5GW storage. CS Energy, Stanwell active.
stateBreakdown.westernAustralia: Separate grid (SWIS not NEM). Alinta Energy (Sembcorp) has BESS. WA government BESS procurement active.

csCapitalContext.description: Australian renewable energy advisory and asset management firm. Fully integrated advisory, strategic, and capital services.
csCapitalContext.trackRecord: A$1bn+ capital advisory track record. A$1bn+ asset management track record.
csCapitalContext.specialisation: Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) - advisory and asset management.
csCapitalContext.model: Integrated end-to-end model: M&A advisory + capital advisory + asset management
csCapitalContext.experience: Deep buy-side and sell-side experience in Australian RE and BESS transactions
csCapitalContext.relevance: CS Capital is well-positioned as BESS becomes the dominant deal type in Australian RE market (2024-2030)

capeXBenchmarks.trend: ~15-20% annual cost reduction continuing. Chinese LFP manufacturers (CATL, BYD) driving cost down.
capeXBenchmarks.note: All-in costs include battery system, BOS, civil works, connection, development costs

keyInvestors.name: BlackRock / Akaysha Energy
keyInvestors.notes: Owns Waratah Super Battery. Most active BESS investor in Australia.

keyInvestors.name: HMC Capital
keyInvestors.notes: Owns Victorian Big Battery. ASX-listed alternative asset manager focused on RE.

keyInvestors.name: Neoen / Brookfield
keyInvestors.notes: Hornsdale HPR (SA). Largest historical BESS developer/owner.

keyInvestors.name: AGL Energy
keyInvestors.notes: Torrens Island, Liddell BESS pipeline. Major utility BESS investor.

keyInvestors.name: Origin Energy
keyInvestors.notes: Eraring BESS proposed. Significant BESS pipeline.

keyInvestors.name: Macquarie GIG
keyInvestors.notes: Active BESS developer across NEM states.

keyInvestors.name: Quinbrook
keyInvestors.notes: BESS development pipeline in QLD and NSW.

keyInvestors.name: Edify Energy
keyInvestors.notes: Co-located solar+BESS developer. Multiple NEM projects.

keyInvestors.name: Akaysha Energy
keyInvestors.notes: BESS developer acquired by BlackRock. Key platform.
